MNUS Customer Specific Operational Flow Order -- EFF 3/4


Notice Text:

Due to high system demand and large daily imbalances, Maritimes & Northeast (M&N) has limited operational flexibility to manage imbalances.  Therefore, in order to maintain the operational integrity of the system, M&N is issuing an Operational Flow Order (OFO) pursuant to Section 10.4 of the General Terms and Conditions of M&N's FERC Gas Tariff, effective 9:00 AM CCT, March 4, 2026, for certain delivery point parties on the M&N system.  M&N will be contacting the affected parties.

 

This OFO does not affect the ability of M&N to receive or deliver quantities of gas for scheduled nominations to any customer or pipeline.

 

During the effectiveness of this OFO, the notified party must be balanced such that actual deliveries of gas out of the system must be equal to or less than scheduled deliveries out of the system for the associated meter on the OBA contract.  The penalty shall apply to each dekatherm of actual delivery quantities that exceeds the greater of 250 Dth or 102% of scheduled delivery quantities.  The penalty will be equal to three times the arithmetic average of daily Platts Gas Daily "Daily Price Survey" posting for the High Common price for the "Tennessee, zone 6 delivery", as defined in Section 10.8(b) of the General Terms and Conditions of M&N's FERC Gas Tariff for the day on which such violation occurred.  In addition, M&N will not permit retroactive nominations to avoid an OFO penalty.

 

This OFO will remain in effect until further notice.

 

Please refer to the table below for the effected M&N operational areas, dates, and tolerance percentages:

 

Operational Area

Gas Day March 3

Gas Day March 4 and until further notice

System Wide

No System Wide OFO

No System Wide OFO

Customer Specific

No Customer Specific OFO

No Due Pipe OFO 2% / 250

 

NOTE:

Deliveries No DP : Shippers are not to take more than scheduled

Deliveries No DS : Shippers are not to take less than scheduled

Receipts No DP : Shippers are not to give less than scheduled

Receipts No DS : Shippers are not to give more than scheduled

 

 

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.



BackPrint
